description: Emotion for women by pierre cardin is a floral chypre fragrance for women, launched in 2005. Top notes are litchi, black currant and juniper; middle notes are orchid, jasmine and lotus; base notes are amber, patchouli and woodsy notes.Quantity: 50 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
